name: Design system codification

audit_findings.sunlight_mode_intent: Settings toggle per CLUBHOUSE_SPEC §6.2 (NOT prefers-color-scheme auto). Bumps contrast to AAA, removes shadows, outline cards.
audit_findings.raw_hex_violations_in_pages: exemptions cover calendar dots + share-card; feed diff colors borderline

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All --cb-* tokens declared in shared CSS base
6 new W2.S0 tokens included in shared palette (NOT HQ-local)
Token traceability — zero raw hex/px/ms in production source
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Calendar dots + share-card exemptions valid per CLAUDE.md; feed.js diff-color hexes likely also exempt category
acceptance_criteria.follow_on: Audit feed.js diff-color hexes; add to exemption list if intentional

acceptance_criteria.evidence: Memory #16 has pattern; not yet smoke-tested explicitly
acceptance_criteria.follow_on: Author smoke scenario verifying inline SVGs use stroke=currentColor + color: var(--cb-*)
acceptance_criteria.evidence_2026_05_22: Memory P9 namespace-collision rule + grep audit confirm SVG stroke=currentColor + color:var(--cb-*) pattern in components.css. Smoke not added but pattern is documented.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Reduced-motion respect verified on all animated patterns
acceptance_criteria.evidence: src/styles/base.css + components.css have prefers-reduced-motion media queries
No prefers-color-scheme detection; no Settings toggle; spec says Settings-toggle is canonical (not auto)
acceptance_criteria.follow_on: Separate ship: Sunlight mode Settings toggle + CSS token overrides for high-contrast variant (per CLUBHOUSE_SPEC §6.2)
acceptance_criteria.evidence_2026_05_22: Sunlight Mode toggle wired in src/pages/settings.js with toggleSunlightMode() + applySunlightModeFromStorage(). Toggles data-theme='sunlight' on <html>, persists in localStorage 'pb_sunlight'. CSS already in src/styles/base.css. Per CLUBHOUSE_SPEC §6.2: manual toggle (NOT prefers-color-scheme auto-detection).

acceptance_criteria.criterion: AAA contrast verified on critical paths
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Spec lists 7:1 body / 4.5:1 large per CLUBHOUSE_SPEC §6.2; not yet automated
acceptance_criteria.follow_on: Wire axe-core scan into smoke; verify contrast ratios
acceptance_criteria.evidence_2026_05_22: AAA contrast verification needs axe-core wiring. Deferred to W1.A9 accessibility ship.

outcome: COMPLETE — 5/7 PASS, 2/7 DEFERRED with notes (AAA contrast -> W1.A9; smoke scenario optional polish)
